2603.17942.title: Efficient Training-Free Multi-Token Prediction via Embedding-Space Probing
2603.17942.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit latent multi-token prediction (MTP) capabilities despite being trained solely for next-token generation. We propose a simple, training-free MTP approach that probes an LLM using on-the-fly mask tokens drawn from its embedding space, enabling parallel prediction of future tokens without modifying model weights or relying on auxiliary draft models. Our method constructs a speculative token tree by sampling top-K candidates from mask-token logits and applies a lightweight pruning strategy to retain high-probability continuations. During decoding, candidate predictions are verified in parallel, resulting in lossless generation while substantially reducing the number of model calls and improving token throughput. Across benchmarks, our probing-based MTP consistently outperforms existing training-free baselines, increasing acceptance length by approximately 12\% on LLaMA3 and 8--12\% on Qwen3, and achieving throughput gains of up to 15--19\%. Finally, we provide theoretical insights and empirical evidence showing that decoder layers naturally align mask-token representations with next-token states, enabling accurate multi-step prediction without retraining or auxiliary models.
2603.17942.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）儘管僅為下一個標記生成進行訓練，但仍展現出潛在的多標記預測（MTP）能力。<lb/>我們提出了一種簡單的無需訓練的 MTP 方法，通過使用從其嵌入空間中提取的即時遮罩標記來探測 LLM，實現未來標記的並行預測，而無需修改模型權重或依賴輔助草稿模型。<lb/>我們的方法通過從遮罩標記的 logits 中抽樣前 K 個候選標記來構建一個推測性標記樹，並應用輕量級的修剪策略以保留高概率的延續。<lb/>在解碼過程中，候選預測是並行驗證的，從而實現無損生成，同時顯著減少模型調用次數並提高標記通量。<lb/>在各種基準測試中，我們基於探測的 MTP 始終超越現有的無訓練基準，LLaMA3 的接受長度增加約 12\%，Qwen3 則增加 8--12\%，通量增益達到 15--19\%。<lb/>最後，我們提供理論見解和實證證據，顯示解碼器層自然將遮罩標記表示與下一個標記狀態對齊，從而實現準確的多步預測，而無需重新訓練或輔助模型。
2603.17942.author: Raghavv Goel et.al.
2603.17942.authors: Raghavv Goel, Mukul Gagrani, Mingu Lee, Chris Lott
